response.justification: Bogdan has broad engineering experience across languages and domains, including Java and JVM-related tooling in past roles, but his recent work is heavily focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang with minimal evidence of deep enterprise JVM tooling or IDE development. His open-source contributions and workshops show intellectual curiosity and communication skills, yet there's insufficient proof of hands-on expertise with Spring, build tools, or IDE internals as required.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience with diverse tech stacks and systems
Demonstrated passion for developer tooling and education through workshops and OSS
Proven ability to own complex, end-to-end systems across multiple companies
concerns: Recent roles show minimal Java/Kotlin or Spring ecosystem involvement
No clear evidence of IDE internals, language server protocol, or JVM tooling work
Primary technical focus has shifted away from JVM toward Node.js and DLang
